description:
**Milestone:** Memory Maintenance Pipeline

Modify the appendLearning() flow in libs/utils/src/memory-loader.ts to check for near-duplicates before writing. Before appending a new learning, call KnowledgeStoreService.search() with the learning content as query, filtered to source_file matching the target category. If top result score exceeds dedup threshold (configurable, default BM25 score > -0.5 in SQLite BM25 scale — note SQLite FTS5 BM25 returns negative values, lower = more relevant), skip the append and log 'Deduplicated learning: similar entry already exists in {category}'. Also add a KnowledgeStoreService.findSimilarChunks(projectPath, text, sourceFile) helper for this. Update recordLearningsFromFeature() in apps/server/src/services/auto-mode-service.ts to pass a dedup flag. Run a full index rebuild after successful dedup-checked appends so the new chunk is immediately searchable.

**Files to Modify:**
- libs/utils/src/memory-loader.ts
- apps/server/src/services/knowledge-store-service.ts
- apps/server/src/services/auto-mode-service.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] appendLearning() checks FTS5 for near-duplicates before writing
- [ ] Duplicate learnings are skipped with a log message (not silently dropped)
- [ ] findSimilarChunks() returns top matches filtered by source_file
- [ ] Index rebuilt after successful append so new chunk is immediately searchable
- [ ] Dedup threshold is configurable (knowledgeDedupThreshold in settings)
- [ ] npm run build:packages && npm run build:server passes

**Complexity:** medium
title: Learning Deduplication
